mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `food-system`.employee (name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{name}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE `food-system`.employee SET name = #{name}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, sex = #{sex}, id_number = #{idNumber}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM `food-system`.employee
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
